name: github-monitor
description: Claude Code channel (research preview) that streams real-time GitHub events — PR, CI rollup, AI reviewer status, issues, comments — from a github-relay worker into the session. One-way push over a WebSocket with automatic reconnect and seq-cursor replay. Install the channel binary with `brew install pleaseai/tap/github-monitor`; requires GITHUB_RELAY_WS_URL and --dangerously-load-development-channels (or org allowedChannelPlugins).
